summary: iOS 🟥 FLAMINGO | FALCON | Language change does not update FW on Charge Case
scenario: Language change does not trigger firmware update on Charge Case during DFU process
description_clean: When a language change is triggered, the Charge Case firmware is not updated during the DFU process. After the DFU completes, the Charge Case remains on outdated firmware. Expected behavior: Language change should trigger a firmware update on all components, including the Charge Case.
steps: Trigger a language change on the device.
Initiate the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process.
Wait for the DFU process to complete.
Check the firmware version of the Charge Case.
expected: Language change should trigger a firmware update on all components, including the Charge Case.
actual: After the DFU completes, the Charge Case remains on outdated firmware.
